retrieved_result: How to Remove Stuck or Hot Pixels from Video Footage
Decision_Reason: The article is about removing hot pixels in video footage, not about DIY room decoration ideas.
combined_text_for_llm: How to Remove Stuck or Hot Pixels from Video Footage "One of the drawbacks to shooting movies with DSLRs is the problem of stuck pixels, also known as ""hot"" or ""dead"" pixels.
